issue: Raw model outputs flat cohort at 0.0528 total units for 84% of se01 SKUs; target likely stock-constrained actual_units_sold
recommended_action: Audit training target definition (target_actual_units_sold = actual_units_sold); investigate flat inference output; validate feature-to-target mapping for skincare event type

issue: Policy caps (adjusted_order_cap_units) written into predicted_units_sold demand field; risk/capital dampening applied to demand not order decision
recommended_action: Keep policy caps on order/risk path only; preserve calibrated prediction as demand input; route policy to order_units cap separately

issue: apply_allocation_aware_units_cap shrinks 56% of rows to probability upper bound; may over-cap when feature consensus is low but model signal exists
recommended_action: Review cap_mask thresholds and effective_upper_bound formula; compare capped vs uncapped backtest by segment

issue: adjusted_order_cap_units applied as ceiling on resolved_total_units for demand; 785 rows with baseline/required source >=3 crushed to ~0.05
recommended_action: Do not apply order policy cap to demand forecast total passed to demand contract; cap orders downstream only

issue: feature_probability_expected_units_consensus materially higher (p50=0.56, max=113) but not validated as truth
recommended_action: Continue sanity-check/escalation only until provenance validated against actuals; do not replace model demand
